mapper.sql: select id, program_id, task_type, target_year, priority, status, source_hint_url, failure_reason, created_by, assigned_to, started_at, finished_at, created_at from data_collection_task
mapper.insert: insert into data_collection_task (program_id, task_type, target_year, priority, status, source_hint_url, failure_reason, created_by, assigned_to, started_at, finished_at) values (#{programId}, #{taskType}, #{targetYear}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{sourceHintUrl}, #{failureReason}, #{createdBy}, #{assignedTo}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt})
mapper.delete:
delete from data_collection_task where id in
#{id}
